title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo – get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node and browsers to talk with a local Ollama server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama as an LLM and embeddings provider.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Clean open-source web UI (React + FastAPI) to chat with any Ollama-managed model.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Feature-rich Rust CLI that wraps Ollama endpoints for pulling, listing, tagging, and chatting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local LLM code completion via Ollama (Mistral, CodeLlama).

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU/node selectors.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Tauri desktop app (Rust core + React frontend) for chatting with Ollama models offline.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama supporting streaming chat, pull, and embedding APIs.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem providing idiomatic access to the Ollama REST API with ActiveModel-style responses.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets a server chat with local Ollama models slash-command style.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app + REST API for managing and querying Ollama models from web or mobile frontends.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET Standard 2.0 client for Ollama with streaming chat and embeddings; NuGet package available.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-laravel
summary: Laravel package providing a fluent wrapper around Ollama with facades and queue support.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app that connects to Ollama for local LLM conversations with session memory.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for summarizing notes, generating text, and Q&A using an Ollama backend.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake adding Ollama and common models to nixpkgs for reproducible local deployments.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision an EC2 GPU instance with Ollama and models pre-installed.
